{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Helgard Gate
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A [[Helgard Gate]] is a shimmering white portal.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A giant may have used a [[Helgard Gate]] to emerge from the snow.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3">''City of Light'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
